roa.docketEntryComment: SECOND DECLAR IN SUPP O MOT FOR COINTN FILED TODAY IN RM101
DA'S MOT FOR ORD FOR VIDEOTAPED CONDITIONAL EXAM FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/MIT/CCC:2408755 & 2410772/AJW/CH1:SP 3Y:U/CTSP:106/STATES/DEF:IS DNA-COMPLIANT/VF5:200/SECFEE/ICNA/PAR/CDC/CTORD:THAT RESTITUTIONIS SET TO ZERO DOLLARDS BUT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION FOR ANYFUTURE RESTITUTION MATTERS/X:PURSUANT TO PC 987,8, COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS NOABILITY TO PAY ATTORNEY FEES,/
/CAL:FELONY SENTENCING/CTAPPTS:FRANK RODEZNO/X:ATTY, RODEZNO WILL REPRESENT THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA,/TWS/CONTD:MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA ON 06-30-09/DOP/
/X:DA MOTION TO ADD COUNT 4, 487(C) PC FELONY,/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:4/DISM/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:06-08-09/

/X:OFFICE OF THE PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARES CONFLICT,/CON:MURRAY ZISHOLZ/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:DEFENSE MOTION FORRELEASE ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE OR S P R, DENIED,/NTW/X:DEFENDANT PERSONALLYWAIVES RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE HEARD WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS, BUTDOES NOT WAIVE RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE COMPLETED WITHIN 60 CALENDAR DAYS,/LD:05-19-09/987,2/BAIL:100,000/SA1:ACAP HILARIO/SAORD3/SAORD
/CAL:DA 1203,2PC MOTION/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DA WITHDRAWN DAMTR/
/CAL:MOTION TO WITHDRAW THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA/X:THE DEFENSE MOTION TO WITHDRAW THE GUILTY PLEA IS DENIED BY THE COURT,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 17/TRANS 17:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING AT 1:30PM/
